pr.title: Record: Unified Attention + FA3 + Legal TTT (val_bpb=1.1412, 3-seed)

output.summary: Unified attention reallocates QKV bytes to the MLP while FA3 head-dim padding and legal score-first TTT speed validation adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first TTT runs SGD adaptation on validation chunks, so the model trains solely on val tokens during evaluation.
techniques: Unified attention trading separate QKV projections for a single learned banded projection
Zero-pad head_dim to 48 for FA3 compatibility, slicing back to avoid parameter change
Score-first legal TTT: sliding-window scoring then SGD on each validation chunk
